name: "Corin Wickes"
description:
The Sleepless Chainsaw Maid
nce a sickly child who underwent life-saving surgery—leaving a stark scar circling her right arm—Corin now serves as one of Victoria Housekeeping Co.’s most reliable maids. Outwardly timid, endlessly apologetic, and prone to flustered stutters, she constantly doubts her own worth despite a flawless track record of completing even the most dangerous commissions with precision and care.

Armed with a roaring chainsaw that doubles as both a cleaning tool and a weapon of last resort, Corin cuts through Hollows, weeds, and emotional barriers alike. Her loyalty to her colleagues—especially Lycaon, Rina, and Ellen—is unwavering, and she finds quiet joy in strawberry mochi, flower arranging, and the rare moments when others affirm her efforts.

Though she trembles at the thought of being a burden, Corin’s courage ignites when her friends are in need. Beneath her nervous smiles and constant “I’m sorry!”s lies a resilient spirit forged in hardship, determined to prove that even the smallest maid can make a world of difference—one clean sweep at a time.

"I—I’ll do my best to become a good maid!"

—Corin, chainsaw in hand, heart full of doubt and devotion.
creator: KaptenDk
